body:
## Summary
- route the Giscus drawer loader and theme postMessage target through a configurable Giscus host
- default enabled comments to `https://comment-api.sepo.sh`
- document the new `GISCUS_APP_HOST` override

## Checks
- `npm run check`
- `GISCUS_APP_HOST=https://comment-api.sepo.sh npm run build`

Follow-up customization work can now happen in `self-evolving/comment-api` without requiring another GitHub App install.

title: Use Sepo-hosted Giscus service
